items.title: Amazon Raises $15 Billion In Oversubscribed Bond Sale Amid Surging AI Cost
items.description: Amazon is returning to the bond market with a $15 billion sale as it ramps up AI spending, joins rivals Meta and Oracle in a major tech borrowing wave, and draws strong investor demand despite rising infrastructure costs.

items.title: The ‘JPMorgan Boys’ Behind the U.S. Bailout for Argentina
items.description: The ‘JPMorgan Boys’ Behind the U.S. Bailout for Argentina

items.title: JPMorganChase Announces Largest Financial Fraud and Scam Prevention Effort in Firm’s History
items.description: NEW YORK, November 17, 2025--JPMorganChase is launching the largest fraud and scam prevention initiative in the bank’s history, including components related to consumer education, prevention, awareness and continuing investments in operational enhancements designed to reduce fraud attacks.

items.title: NVIDIA and 2 Stocks to Buy for Earnings Growth
items.description: NVIDIA leads a trio of stocks showing strong earnings growth and rising estimates, signaling potential momentum ahead.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Stocks pulled back on Monday, with tech shares largely trading lower. That included Nvidia, which dropped about 2% ahead of its earnings on Wednesday.
